title: Hilton India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hilton India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hilton India! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hilton India:
Hilton India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hilton India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
